ad45424d31852b7a.text:
Dear Julia,

I just want to take a moment to thank you from the bottom of my heart for everything you have done for me, i really do not know where i would be without you my friend and i pray that the lord blesses you abundantly for the love you have shown me. Through all the storms i have walked through you were always right there with me, you never once made me feel alone and i thank you so much for that. I rememberthose late nights when i would cry on the phone and you would just listen, never judging me, just being there and that means the world to me. You are honestly the best friend that i could ever asks for and i am beyond grateful for everything that you did do for me. May the lord keep you and keep watching over you my dear.

With love,
your friend

97f2ffcbac95a986.text:
Dear sister,
I want to begin by telling you how proud I am of you, even though I know things have not been easy these past months. I know the pain and sufferings you have been carrying quietly, and I want you to know that I see all of it, and I am holding you in my heart through every step. 
The way you have been handling this situation has shown a strength that not everyone has. I look at you and I am reminded of all the things you have already overcome, the way you finished your studies when nobody believed it was possible, the way you stood up for our family when life kept knocking us down. Those past successes are proof of who you are. 
Please do not give up on yourself. I believe in your achievements and the ones still coming. Keep going, one step at a time. 
With all my love,

3dacc840f69a1ab3.text:
dear Melisa
i hope this letter finds you well, seriously, it has been weighing on me how long it has been since we sat down properly. there is so much to catch up on and i cannot wait to hear it all from you. 

life on my side has been a whole adventure, i started a new job recently and the people there are kind, it reminds me of you in some way, the way you used to make everyone feel at home wherever you were. school is also keeping me on my toes but i'm pushing through. my family is doing okay, mom asks about you almost every Sunday, she still talks about that lasagna you made her once.

i saw a little bookshop the other day and it reminded me of those long afternoons we used to spend reading together. let's plan something soon, drinks, dinner, anything, i miss you alot.

hearts and regards
from me

2811523f9eb4a430.text:
im so sorry about your loss my friend , i still cannot believe Bobo is gone , he was such an amazing dog , the way he used to run to the gate everytime i came over , the way he loved everyone , he was really one of a kind. you raised him so well , i know how much he meant to you , he was not just a dog he was family.

please know that iam here for you , if theres anything you need you can tell me , i mean anything , whether you just want to talk or you want me to come sit with you i will be there , dont be shy to call me. may you find strength during this difficult time my dear , i will support you all the way , take it one day at a time , dont rush the healing , its okay to cry , its okay to miss him , he was loved

b9e8ded058fbff15.text: Hello. May this find everyone in good spirits today as we all gathered here to celebrate this beautiful union. I want to start by sending so much love to everyone in the premises, family, friends, all of you that took the time to stand here with us, it really does mean alot. Look around you, the beauty of this place is truly something to take in, the flowers, the smiles, the love that is hanging in the air today. To the bride and groom, you both look absolutely stunning today, words cannot do justice to how beautiful you both look. I want to pour my heart out to you both and say I am so proud of the journey you've taken together and the journey ahead of you. May this love grow stronger every day. May you always be each other's home. Thank you everyone for being part of this. Love and light.

fb0e6678c669e656.text:
hey l am writting this letter to you to say thank you for everything you have done for me , l really mean it from the bottom of my heart , you did not have to do anything for me but you still chose to and i will always remember that , the way you stood by me when no one else did , the way you made me feel seen and loved , it was truly amazing

you are an amazing person , you have such a kind heart , not many people can do what you do for others , you give without expecting anything back and that is something so rare these days , l am lucky to call you my friend , l am happy l have you in my life , l hope l can be even half the friend to you that you are to me , l love you and thank you so much

9218f3e1bab6c672.text:
Dear friend, I was sad and heartbroken to hear about your grandmother's passing. I cannot find the right words for the pain that I imagine has filled the heart of every member of your family at this time. May the Lord be with you all and bring you the comfort that only He can give. 
I will never forget the summer we all spent together at her home. Grandma told us all those wonderful stories by moonlight, and we laughed and laughed. She had this beautiful gift, the gift of making everyone feel included, of making strangers feel like family. That is something I will carry with me always. 
Please know that words are small at a time like this, but you are not alone. I am here for you in every step of the way, whatever you need, day or night. Thinking of you and your family with love.

with love and condolences,

32200b4a1561ffcf.text:
My dearest love,

I know things haven´t been easy lately, and I see how hard you´ve been trying to stray strong even when no one is watching. I want you to take a deep breath, just for a moment, and let yourself feel held. 

You are not alone in this - I am right here, the way I have always been. Through the messy days, the quite days, the days you feel like nothing makes sense - I will not move from your side. You don´t need to have everything figured out right now. Life does not ask that of us. 

Throught all of this, please remember who you are - my best friend, my partner, my calm, my home, my sun, my rainbow, my everything. I love you, love you , love you, love you so so so so so much. We will get throught this, one slow morning at a time.

0c9cafa4e5d14193.text:
Dear friend,

It is me, your long lost colleague. I have been thinking about you a lot these past weeks since I heard about everything you are going through. I am so sorry that life is asking so much of you right now. The divorce, losing the house, all of it at once - I cannot imagine how heavy your heart must feel.

I know you have a beautiful group of friends who already want to wrap themselves around you, and that is no small thing. But I want you to know that I am also here. Not just in the abstract way people sometimes mean when they say it, but really, truly here. If you need a place to stay, my home is your home. Move in with me. Bring your boxes, bring your tears, bring whatever else you need. We will figure the rest out together.

Yours sincerely,
Your friend.

4185f9408bb42ebf.text: Dear Melisa, I hope you are good. It has been on my mind for so long now to reach out to you, and I am finally putting it on paper. I am writing to find out how you have been keeping. Life has been moving so fast on my side, and I imagine the same for you, but I do not want too much time to pass without us hearing each other's voices. I miss you, dear friend. I miss the easy laughter, the long talks, the way we could sit in silence and still understand each other. So much has happened since the last time we saw each other; I know there is so much for both of us to share. Can we please meet for drinks and catch up? It has been a while, far too long actually. Choose the place and the time, and I will be there.

250c97e696c3a01a.text: Dear friend, I want to begin by thanking you for the moment you gave to me to write to you and extend my condolences. Your father was like my second father with the way he treated me, you know that. I still remember how he would call me by that nickname only he used and how he made me feel like one of his own. You don't know how devastated I was when I heard the news about your father, I literally sat down and could not move for hours. I lost my parent too last year as you know, so definitely I kind of know how you feel, or I can say I slightly know the feelings you are having now, but everyone's grief is their own. Please find it in your heart to lean on the people who love you. If there's anything I can do please let me know, anything at all, day or night.

f5acc4cb5f1bc468.text: I want you to know that I have been carrying this on my heart since the day of our argument, and I am so sorry. The words I said to you should never have left my mouth. I knew the moment I said them that I had crossed a line, but my pride would not let me take them back in that moment, and for that I am even more sorry. You did not deserve any of it. I wish I could reach into that day and pull every word back, because seeing you hurt like this is the last thing I ever wanted. I don't like seeing you carry pain that I caused. You have been such an amazing friend to me, more like family really, and I do not take that for granted. I am asking, please, give me a chance to make this right. I love you and I am truly sorry.

f31e9a572cfce580.text: The joy in our voices speaks so loud and rings out in our hearts on this beautiful day. Thank you, each and every one of you, for joining us to celebrate this special occasion of a life so dear to all of us. As we stand here today, surrounded by laughter and love, I want us to take a moment and raise a toast to you on your delightful birthday. May this new year of your life be filled with peace beyond what you can imagine. May God give you the strength to walk through every season ahead, the wisdom to grow into the person He has called you to be, and the grace to enjoy every step. We will always be here for you, no matter the weather, no matter the day, no matter the night. Sending you more love and more joy on this beautiful day. Happy birthday to you, my dear friend!

ce70814ac3d5c4bf.text: As we gather here today, my heart is so full I can barely contain it. These two beautiful souls before us are meant to be together...one can see it from a mile away. I have had the rare privilege of watching their love grow and flourish throughout the years, and let me tell you, what they share is real, deep and rare. Through every up, every down, every laugh, every tear, they have chosen each other again and again. We celebrate today your commitment to each other, a commitment built not on perfection but on love, patience and faith in one another. Congratulations on your marriage, my dear ones. I wish you a lifetime of happiness, a lifetime of laughter, a lifetime of growing together. You are seen, you are loved, you are blessed and you are awesome! Let us all raise our glasses to the most beautiful couple I know!

671b6a296370031c.text:
I really do not know how to begin this because nothing in life prepared me to stand here and speak about you in past tense. We had a relationship that was unlike anything else in my life, before everything else there was you, and i think that is the part that is breaking me the most today. I keep going back to all the small memories we shared, the silly afternoons, the long phone calls that turned into early mornings, the way you laughed at jokes that were not even funny just because you knew it would make me laugh too. 

The emptiness that you have left inside of my heart is something i am still learning to sit with. coping with the loss of you and trying to accept that you are no longer here, it keeps me awake at night. I promise i will carry your love with me everywhere, my ride or die, until we meet again.

de8c42da1622e75b.text:
Dear friend,

I am writing to you because it has been so long since we've last talked and I have been thinking about you often lately. I keep wondering how your life has been unfolding since we lost touch. Did you follow your dream career path, the one we used to talk about for hours when we were younger? I really hope you did, because I always believed in it more than you knew.

I also have to ask, did you ever end up getting that reptile for a pet? You used to talk about it all the time and I cannot bring myself to write this letter without asking. I imagine you with a little gecko climbing on your shoulder while you read this and it makes me smile.

What are you up to now? Please write back when you can. I would love to hear everything.

Sincerely,
Your old friend

b19f32443acf7f8a.text: My dearest friend, please do not worry, everything will be okay. I see how heavy your heart has been carrying everything and I want you to know that you are not walking this path alone. Our dream lives will never be on a straight path, never have been and never will be, and that is part of the beauty of it. Every twist and turn is shaping you into the person you are becoming. Never settle and never give up, always move forward, even if it is just one tiny step at a time. As we sit through this storm together, let us hold on to the truth that storms do pass and morning always comes. Keep pushing, my dear, your journey is halfway through and the most beautiful part is still ahead of you. Let us raise our glasses to brighter days, to peace, to joy and to all the dreams still waiting for you to claim them.

ef5a56653a77bbc6.text: I am very sorry and deeply saddened that I missed our appointment yesterday. I know how much you had been looking forward to it, and I had been looking forward to it too. Please believe me when I say it was not something I would have ever skipped on purpose. An emergency came up at home that I had to take care of immediately, and by the time things settled down it was already too late to even call you the way I should have. For that, I am even more sorry. I would like to make it up to you properly. Please let me take you out for lunch this week, your choice of place, on me. It is the very least I can do for someone who has been such a good friend to me. I value our friendship deeply and I do not want a missed afternoon to sit between us. Please forgive me.

3281f94bed170f48.text:
I am sitting down to write this with a mix of emotions in my heart, but most of all i am feeling truly sorry for my part in what happened. I have been thinking about it over and over and i realize now that my actions hurt you, and for that i am deeply regretting.

I don't see our friendship the same way without making this right and i have been carrying it around like a heavy stone. You did not deserve any of what i said or did, and i am ashamed of how i acted in that moment.

I enjoy sharing big moments with you,happy or sad i have always cherished it. Only God knows about the future but i pray that you will find it in your heart to forgive me one day. If it wasn't for distance i would've been at your door already. I am so so sorry friend.

54c052268fc3ce92.text:
Hey Friend. I hope your doing well, even though i know things between us havent been good since that day. i've been wanting to write you this letter for a while now but i didnt know how to start. I am So sorry for everything. truly. Please find it in your heart to forgive me, even if it takes time. 

It was never my intentions to hurt you-not for one second. i look back at that whole day and i still cant believe how it all spiraled. Ive been replaying our conversation in my head, and every time, i hate myself a little more for the words i chose. i miss you, and, more importantly, i miss us. 

If you cant forgive me, i will never forgive my self either, because you are someone i should have protected, not hurt. Lets not let this silence keep us apart any longer. please, even just a call. Im here whenever your ready.

6b21fe09f70f0013.text: My dear friend Steve was the kind of person who always showed up, no matter what the circumstance, and he certainly proved that to me again last month when I was lying in that hospital bed. The fact that you traveled such a long distance just to come and sit with me for a few hours is something I will never be able to repay, and frankly I would not even know how to begin. That was a very scary time of my life, more frightening than I let on to most people, and your support in those days was hugely important to me in ways that words can hardly capture. I remember waking up and seeing you there in that uncomfortable hospital chair and thinking how lucky I am to have a friend of so many years who would drop everything for me. Thank you, truly, from the bottom of my heart. You will always have my deepest gratitude.

3c1b160a2bc93c87.text:
Hi Sarah

It has been on my heart for some time to sit down and write you a proper thank you, and I am finally doing it now. The past year was easily the hardest of my life, the divorce nearly broke me, and I do not say that lightly. You were there from the very first day I called you crying. You did not flinch, you did not judge, you just showed up.

What made the biggest difference is that you did not just listen, you got me the professional help I needed when I was too lost to look for it myself. That changed everything for me. 

I am slowly stepping into a new chapter now, looking at a possible move and even thinking about going back to study something I love. None of these plans would feel possible without you holding me up first. 

Thank you, friend. 

Warm regards

d326a5ded54a9dc8.text: thank you so much my friend Daniel, it was a blessing to have someone like you in my life during such a difficult time. one of the things i will never forget is how you came over without me even asking and helped me move all my things when i had nowhere else to turn. he was kind and patient and generous in a way you do not see alot in this world today. He gave without expecting anything in return and he treated me with respect even when i was at my lowest. He encouraged me and reminded me that things would get better even when i could not see it myself and i will always be grateful because he taught me what real friendship looks like. his kindness made such a big diffrence in my life and our friendship is even stronger now,it has shown me that the bond we share is something rare and precious i will always be grateful for him and for the time we have shared,his good heart will continue to inspire me everyday i thank him dearly.

b0a026e244adc724.text:
Dear friend,

Words cannot express how much I have missed you these past years. Between the lockdowns, the travel restrictions, and all the strange weight that covid placed on every part of our lives, our communication slowly slipped through the cracks, and I am sorry for my part in that. 

I am writing to share the news that, after what felt like an endless season of piece jobs and learnerships, I have finally found a permanent job. I am working cities away from home and from everyone else I love, but I am holding on to the bigger picture that brought me here in the first place. 

I also want to take this moment to say that I am truly proud of you and the spotlight you have stepped into. You have always deserved every bit of it. Let us begin to plan a friends catch up trip somewhere quiet, somewhere we can talk for hours like old times. 

Yours in friendship,

36bdc3ce284e037f.text:
Hello Jo! It has been on my mind for the longest time to sit down and write you this letter, and I am so happy I finally am. I have really missed you, my old friend, and I have been thinking that I should plan a visit to come and see you in person. We were practically inseparable back then, and I refuse to let life pull us further apart!
I also have some good news to share with you. I got a PhD position! I still cannot quite believe it myself, and you were the first person I wanted to tell. I know how much you always cheered me on through the long study nights, and I carry that with me.
Most importantly, congratulations on your marriage! I want to hear everything-how she is, how the day was, how married life is treating you. I am looking forward to our next adventure together, my friend.

9b927ad059f87f69.text:
Dear friend,
I just want to take a moment to thank you, truly, for everything you did for my cousin during a time when she really needed someone. I know you stepped in without me even asking, and you offered her not only emotional support but practical help on the days she could barely get out of bed. 
Your kindness made such a big difference, more than you probably realize. She has told me again and again how much your presence meant to her, and seeing her start to find her footing again has touched me in ways words cannot capture. 
You have always been the kind of friend who shows up quietly and does the work without ever expecting anything in return, and I value our friendship so deeply for that. I hope one day, in some form, I can return the favor. Until then, please know how grateful I am for who you are.
With all my love,
Your friend

b0dc8d80ed372fa6.text: Hello my love, I hope you've been holding up okay even though I know things have been heavy on your side lately. I can't stand seeing you carry all of this on your own. I just want to remind you that I will never leave you, no matter how dark the days feel. Life has been throwing lemons at you, one after the other, and I see how tired you've become. Please don't think you have to be strong all by yourself. We will get through this together and conquer as we always do. I've been with you through worse, remember? And we came out the other side. One day we will look back and reminisce about all this and laugh, I promise you. Take it one day at a time and lean on me whenever you need to. You are not alone in this. Keep well and take care of yourself.

86f35c256e7441be.text:
Hey friend
I have been meaning to write to you for some time now to remind you that you are not alone in this season. I know it feels like everything is happening at once and that you have to figure it all out by yourself but please know i am right here. You are doing well even when it does not feel like it, just look at how far you have come from last year. I am always going to be here when you need help, whether its a phone call at midnight or just to come sit with you in silence. you are strong and capable, more than you give yourself credit for, i have seen you carry things that would break most people and you still got up the next morning. I am so proud of you and the way you keep showing up for yourself. take it one day at a time, breath, and lets talk soon.

338dc83f2d10085c.text:
I give all thanks to The God Almighty for blessing me with a friend like you. Dear friend, i bless the day our paths crossed and i will forever be grateful for the support you gave me during my research. 

I remember the long nights you stayed up reading my drafts and giving me feedback when nobody else had the patience for it. I never took that for granted. Your support has impacted my career in ways i still cannot fully measure, every door that has opened for me since then carries your handprint on it.

I vow that even as life moves us in different directions, i will always keep our connection close to my heart. I really value the support i received and i pray that one day i will be able to stand by you the way you stood by me. 

Thank you again my dear friend, may God continue to bless you and lift you up.

b310ae0a94b00fda.text:
dear friend,
I am very sorry about the way I behaved during our argument the other night. I have been thinking about it everyday since then and i need you to know that i am truly sorry. 

I know what caused all of this, my own pride and the way I refused to listen when you were trying to explain yourself to me. I should have stayed calm and i should have heard you out, but instead i raised my voice and said things that I do not even believe. 

What i feel right now is shame and a lot of regret, my heart has been heavy, i can barely sleep at night thinking about the look on your face that evening.

I take full responsibility for my mistakes and i promise i am working on changing the way i react when things get hard. Please let me make it up to you, dinner this weekend, my treat.

Love
me.

e9213e3ba17237fd.text:
Hey friend!
I honestly do not know where to start with this letter, but I want to say thank you, truly, for being there for me when I went through this hard time with my health.
Those months were some of the scariest of my life- the appointments, the waiting, the long nights when I could not sleep. And you were there for every single one. Driving me places, sitting with me in waiting rooms, sending me silly memes when I needed to laugh.
I appreciate how you always go the extra mile to make me feel the best, even on the days I had absolutely nothing to give back. That is rare, and I do not take it for granted.
I just wish I could return the favor and be there for you, too, when you need it. Please know that the moment you do, I am there. No questions.
With all my love,
your friend.

33c1803fd755a3db.text: Dear friend, I am sincerely sorry for the pain I have caused you, my heart is heavy and i have been struggling to find the right words to put on this paper. I hope you find the strength to read this letter to the end and hear me out. Do not be hard on me for too long though, I know I owe you the chance to be angry. It was never my intentions to hurt you, please believe me when I say that. I admit I was at fault and I take full accountability for everything that came out of my mouth that day.Your friendship has always been one of the most precious things in my life and the thought of having broken your trust keeps me awake at night. I assure you it was not intentional, it was an honest mistake born out of a moment of weakness. Please, let me make it up to you. Whatever it takes, however long it takes, I am here.

409931e7e04cad6b.text:
Hey everyone, today I get to stand up here and talk about my dear friend Tasha, and honestly there is so much I could say about her. Tasha and I met in our first year at university, we used to see each other in the study locks all the time and eventually we just started saying hello, and from there we became friends, and from there we became family really. I cannot believe how far we have come.

What I love about her is that she has always being true to me, never two-faced, never fake. She has never made me feel like I was begging for more friendship than she was willing to give, she meets me where I am every single time. She is the kind of friend who shows up and stays. Tasha, I am so proud of you my friend, and I am so grateful to be standing here with you today. Cheers!

1bb2768a0369a376.text: Today I stand here in front of you not as the same person who walked into your life two years ago because everything in me has shifted because of you. We have been together for two years and I still remember the days when life was hard and I did not believe in much, I was carrying things from my past that almost broke me but you walked in and gently took some of that weight off me. Today I take a vow before God and before everyone here that I am leaving the old life behind so that we can grow together side by side. I promise to build our legacy with you brick by brick and to let our success speak for itself, we do not need to shout it from rooftops. May God guide us in every step we take, in every storm and in every bright morning, and may He keep our hearts soft toward each other. I love you and I choose you, today and forever.

afad2222cee07378.text:
Good day everyone, thank you for coming today to bid farewell to a soul we all loved so dearly. I had the rare privelege of knowing this amazing soul we are burying today and trust me when i say the world has lost something precious. He was deeply involved in community service, the kind that did not need a camera or applause, and after he passed almost everyone in this room volunteered to take up where he left off, that says everything about the kind of man he was. 

I vividly remember how he singlehandely organized that charity event for the disabled. He had no funding, no big team, just his heart and his phone, and somehow he pulled it off and put smiles on so many faces that day. He turned nothing into something, again and again. 

His kindness will not be forgotten. The world is a cruel place sometimes, but he made it lighter for all of us. Rest well friend.

0c7d73dc97b2eaf2.text: Hallo friend, my name is on this letter because I owe you words I should have said a long time ago. I am writing to apologise for what I said about your family at the gathering last month, and I am writing because I have not been able to sleep peacefully ever since. I am sorry for the words I used. They were unkind, untrue, and they came from a frustrated place that had nothing to do with you. I should have known better, and I should have walked out of that room and cooled my head before opening my mouth. I pledge that this will not happen again, you have my word. I know my words hurt you and even hurt your wife and children who heard about it, and for that I am even more sorry. Please allow me to make this right, in whatever way you see fit. Once again I am deeply sorry, and I thank you for reading this far.

8e3b59c57250bc7b.text:
My love,

Just a few words from my heart to yours on this beautiful day.  We met seven years ago at that little coffee shop on Main Street and I still remember every single thing about that afternoon - your laugh, your terrible attempt at flirting, the way you spilled sugar on the table.  I knew then.

We have been together six wonderful years since, through every storm and every sunny day, and when you finally proposed to me last summer up at the lake, with the sun setting behind you, I think I cried before you even finished the sentence.

My favourite moment with you is still the rainy Sunday we stayed in bed all day eating pancakes and watching old movies - simple, but everything.

I promise to love you forever, through anything and everything.  I am so excited to spend the rest of my life with you.

Your wife x

0dcb22e40c5fd53d.text: dear old friend, i hope you are well i am writing this letter to send my deepest condolences about your loss. the day we met i still remember it clearly, it was at the bus stop on garden road and you needed change for a fare and i had a few coins on me, from that small moment we ended up sitting next to each other and talking the whole ride and that is how we became friends. we used to spend most of our time at the small park near the church, sitting on those wooden benches and watching the kids play, talking about nothing and everything. we used to engage ourselves in playing chess, going for long walks, sometimes just having a beer after work. his personality was the calmest, the most patient i have ever known and i learned alot just by being around him. the last day i saw him we shared a laugh about an old joke and i will hold on to that memory forever. am very sorry for this painful loss my friend

725820d7b66da4c1.text:
My friend, it has been so long since we last spoke and i have been carrying you on my mind for weeks now. The more I sit with it, the more I realize how much time has passed between us and how wrong it was of me to let it go this long. I have been thinking about you so often.
 A lot has happened since we last talked and I want to hear every detail of what is going on with you. How is life treating you these days? Tell me about everything, the small things, the big things. I have grown alot in this season, but i still feel like a piece is missing without our long talks.
 I also recently heared about your mother's passing, and i wanted to tell you how truly sorry I am. She was such a kind soul. please know my heart is with you. 
 I hope we can sit down soon and talk things through properly, like old times. It would mean a lot to me.

5dfa24dac02200f8.text:
Dear colleague,
I am writing this letter to offer you my sincere apology for the unfortunate situation that led to a pay cut being applied to your salary this past month. You know how seriously I take fairness in our team, and that is exactly why this matter has weighed on me since the moment I learnt the truth.
My role in this was unfortunately direct. I issued the instructions to my subordinate to apply the pay cut, based on the attendance data I had been given. As you now know, that data was incorrect. Had I been given the correct figures, this never would have happened.
It was not intentional in any way. I did it without any intention of hurting you, and the moment the right information reached me, I revoked the instructions and asked my subordinate to release your full pay immediately.
Going forward, I shall double check such data to ensure this unpleasant situation does not recur.
Sincerely,

5456590763ec1598.text: Hey , I just want to take a moment and stand here in front of you and tell you everything my heart has been holding. Dear friend,

Words cannot express how truly sorry I am that I was not by your side on your birthday. The very thought of missing such a meaningful day in your life still doesn't sit right with me, but unforeseen circumstances took everything out of my hands the night before. As you know, my dear loved one had been battling a terminal illness for some time, and that emergency call came the night before your celebration day, and there was nothing I could do but go.

I sometimes question myself about what I would have given to have been in two places at once on that day, but I cannot change what happened. What I can do is make it up to you in every way I know how. The gifts I had prepared shall continue to be delivered to you over the coming days, and I would love to take you out for a long lunch, or perhaps a proper night out, to celebrate you the way you deserve.

Thanks a million for your patience, and more!

Yours in friendship!

I want this to be a little reminder for the tough days and a gentle reminder that you matter, more than you'll ever know. You have always been someone i deeply respect and care about, and seeing you struggle in silence is not something i can sit with anymore.

So, when things feel heavy, please contact me, even if it's just to send me a single word and i will know what it means. I would love to invite you for a coffee or a quiet dinner soon, just to sit with you and listen. please reach out- It would mean the world to me.

6777912cad12b019.text:
Dear friend,
I want to thank you for sharing the news of your new role with me. You know that this milestone is very important and I am so proud of how far you have come. Securing this job as an Analyst with such a great company will ensure that your career continues to grow and secure a commendable place in the industry.

This news made me think back to our college days. The style of mischief we ran around with was one of a kind, the late night cramming sessions, the harmless pranks we pulled, all the fun we had during the college years. Those memories created a very favorable foundation for our friendship.

You have always dedicated yourself wholeheartedly to any challenging task, which is also your biggest strength.

Let's meet on this weekend at our favorite hangout place. Hope your family members are doing well and that your father is enjoying his retired life. Keep working hard. Wishing you many more laurels.
Sincerely,

f72095075e43ddb2.text:
Hey , I just wanted to take a moment to tell you how truly sorry I am for what I did. I know things have been heavy between us , but I want you to know I am taking full ownership of what happened and the impact it had on you. I am not making any excuses , and I won't be hiding behind any conditions either. What I did was wrong , and I see that clearly now.

Remember , you're not alone in this - I am here, and I am willing to listen for as long as you need me to. I promise to communicate better , to show up better , and to be more accountable in everything I do going forward. The growth you deserve from me is something I am committed to , no matter how long it takes to rebuild what I broke.

Thank you for the time and the patience you've already given me . Don't give up on us, I am willing to do the work just don't hesitate to shout out.

a53328639796cfb1.text:
Dear Bok,

I am writing this letter to apologize for everything i have done that has hurt you, please find it in your heart to forgive me. I took you for granted and i am so deeply sorry for that, i did not realise how much my actions were affecting you and our relationship. I lied to you about going out with my friends when in actual fact i went somewhere else and i should have just been honest with you from the start. I promise from here on out to never lie to you again, i will be open and tell you the truth even when it is hard. I also want to apologize for not listening to you when you were trying to talk to me, i should have given you my full attention. I pray that the Lord softens your heart toward me and we can move past this.

Take care
Warm regards

02f6ae0769247812.text:
Dear Friend
I want to begin by saying how deeply grateful I am for you and for the kind of friend you have been to me throughout the years. Words are hardly enough to express the depth of my appreciation, but I will try my best. From the very beginning, you have been there for me in ways I never asked for and never expected. Your support, your patience, and your unwavering presence have shaped my life in beautiful ways that I will always carry with me. 
When I was at my lowest, you stood by me without hesitation and reminded me that I was not alone. The way you show up, quietly and consistently, is something truly rare. I want you to know how much that has meant to me. 
I am not sure I will ever be able to fully repay you, but I do hope you know that my heart is full of gratitude and I treasure our friendship deeply. 
With love and gratitude,

0f596cf5a925e39e.text:
dear friend
i really need to take a moment to say how sorry i am for what happened between us. i know i let you down and i hate that i did. you trusted me and i broke that trust, and that is something i carry with me everyday. i can only imagine how let down and hurt you must feel right now and i don't blame you for being upset.

16340dcf8dbed6b6.text:
on this special day we have come together to honor my lovely friend , a person that means so much to me and so many people in this room. i just want to say thank you for being the person you are , kind and loving and always making time even when life gets busy. i remember the days we used to dream about how our lives would look , and now look at you , standing here today and shining the way you do.

you know my friend that life can be hard sometimes , but you always find a way to bring light into every room you walk into. i wish you all the best in life , the kind of joy that lasts and the kind of peace that nobody can take away from you.

im grateful that you are part of my life , i really am , and im looking forward to many more years together.

838bc02f907897e5.text:
Hello. May this letter find you holding on even when it feels impossible. I am sending you all my love and light during this very dark time you're walking through. I want you to know that I am here, I have been here, and I will continue to be here at any given moment whether it's day or night. You are not alone in this. 

I also need to be honest with you because I think you deserve the truth and not just sugar coated words. This pain is not going to disappear overnight. It's still going to be hard, some days harder than others and some days you might feel like you're moving forward only to fall back again. That is okay. Grief does not follow rules . 

Please lean on me when you need to. I am not going anywhere. Love and light.

c34400a3e6d74224.text:
hey so we are here finally , my brother got married and l can't even believe this day is here , l am so happy for you my brother and l am so proud of the man you have become                            you know l have watched you grow from a small boy into a man who knows what he wants in life , and today you found love and you found a wife , and that is such a beautiful thing.

love is a beautiful thing , it really is , it changes you and it shapes you and it brings out the best in you , l can already see how happy you are and that is all l ever wanted for you. l wish you and your wife many many years of love and laughter and lots of children running around the house.

may God bless you both and keep you both and l love you so much my brother

01884c8d49743f00.text:
My love,
From the moment we met at that shopping mall in the early hours of the morning, I knew there was something different about you. You had this quiet warmth about you that I could not quite explain, and even now, three years later, I still feel that same feeling everytime I look at you. I will not take that for granted. 
I cherish all the moments and days we have spent together, the travelling to faraway places, the hiking when our legs were sore, the swimming when we laughed until we could not breathe. Through it all, your love has remained my constant. We have built a life full of laughter, challenges, late nights, and victory, and I would not trade a single day of it. 
You are my best friend, my partner, and my precious gift from God. I cannot wait to spend the rest of my life with you.

with all my love.

db124da8cc5aee18.text:
From the moment you stepped into my life, everything began to shift in the most quiet, beautiful ways. What started as a simple act of kindness turned into something I will never be able to repay - something that reminded me of how good people still exist.

I truly appreciate the time and care you gave when no one else could. The way you showed up - thoughtful, patient, never asking for anything in return - made a real difference in their life. They were not the same after, in the best way possible.

Thank you for being there for me when they needed support and I was running out of strength. Your kindness lifted us both - the late calls, the small gestures, the way you just knew. 

You are not just a friend, you are family - my safe place, my reminder, my light. I love you, love you , love you so so much. Thank you, truly.

2bafd080e01f62a4.text:
Good evening everyone,

It is me, the bride's long lost academically drained best friend. For those of you who do not know me, I have known her since we were 4 years old, that is 21 long years of friendship and counting. I cannot even tell you how many memories we have shared back home, I felt like we were practically raised together.

I remember the day she called me when she first met him. She was beaming through the phone, going on and on, and I knew right then that something was different about this one. And the day he proposed, oh, she could not even get her words out properly. I laughed because for someone who always has something to say, she was completely speechless.

I wish them a happy, long and healthy marriage filled with everything they desire. May the love you share today only grow deeper with time.

Yours sincerely,
The maid of honour.

7b40616f363280c2.text: Greetings, my dear friend, I am writing this letter to show you my deepest gratitude for everything you have done for me. From the very first day I met you, I knew that I had found a friend for life. You have always been the best, and I want to thank you for caring for me even when I did not deserve it. I have received the gift you have sent, and I cannot believe you have thought of me, even when you do not feel okay yourself. That alone shows me the kind of heart that you carry. Friends like you are rare, and I will continue to value you every single day. May you receive double of what you have given to me, and may your kindness come back to you tenfold. Once again, thank you, friend, for everything. I love you, and I will always be there for you the way you have been there for me.

cfff6335ed8d1460.text: You are the best friend that anyone in this world could wish for, and I count myself so lucky to have you in my life. From the day we first met, you have shown me the kind of qualities that everyone hopes to find in a friend. You are loyal, kind, patient, and you have a way of making everyone around you feel safe and seen. I have always admired your honesty and the way you stand by the people you love no matter what. You deserve everything and anything that you desire or wish for, because the kind of love you give out into the world is the kind of love that should always come back to you. I want to wish you a long life, full of joy, laughter, and good health. I wish for you to grow old and to look back on your life and smile. I love you my friend.

1b413ae1baf71aad.text: I never thought I would ever find true love, especially not at the time you came into my life. I want you to know that I had given up on the idea of love completely and then there you were, quietly walking into my world and changing everything I thought I knew. We have been together for a decade now and yet every single day with you still feels like the first few months we had together. I still get that same feeling when you walk into a room, that little flutter, and I think that is the truest sign of how special what we have really is. You are my favorite person in the whole wide world and I cherish your presence in my life more than words could ever say. I promise to keep choosing you everyday, to keep loving you the way you deserve, and to always be the partner that you can lean on. I love you.

18485941a2684f96.text: The depth of your kindness has touched a place in my heart that words may never fully reach, but I will try my best to give it the voice it deserves. I would like to take this moment to express my sincere gratitude to you for all that you have done for me, in the moments you knew about and even in the ones you did not. I truly appreciate all your efforts, every quiet sacrifice, every late night, every time you chose to show up when nobody asked you to. Please know that I will always remember your kindness and generosity, in this season of my life and in every season that follows. You have given me something I will carry forever. Thank you for the everything from the bottom of my heart, no matter the day, no matter the hour, no matter the cost. You will always be in my prayers, in my thoughts, and in my heart.

9e1010b007eeef22.text: As my dearest friend, I want you to know that I appreciate every single time you have helped me, in the small ways and in the big ways too...You have been there for me in seasons that I never thought I would survive and yet here I am, still standing, because of the love you continued to pour into me. Words are not enough to express how much you have held me through the difficult times, how you carried me when I could not carry myself, how you whispered hope into my ears when all I could hear was doubt. I thank you for everything you have done for me, every single act of kindness, every prayer, every moment of patience. You are seen, you are loved, you are valued and you are deeply appreciated! I wish you could see yourself the way I see you, as the most loyal, kindest soul I have ever known. Thank you, my friend, truly.

32b7f42e06b85c7b.text:
I really do not know where to begin with this letter so I just decided to put pen to paper and let it flow. I want to thank you for your presence in my life, for the joy you have brought me and for every single memory we have made together along the way. I cannot count the times you have made me laugh until I cried or the times you sat with me in silence when words were too heavy. 

You have impacted my life in ways you may never fully understand, you shaped the person I am today and i will always be grateful for that. The love I carry for you is the kind of love that does not fade with distance or time, it just grows. you are my ride or die and I want you to know that I will continue to love you and show up for you every single day for as long as I have breath in me.

31363e437ca5c08e.text:
Dear love,

I am writing to you because I know how heavy this season has been on you and I just wanted to remind you of a few things. I know the job search has been hard and that the options have been very limited, especially with everything going on in the country right now. I see you applying day after day, sending out CV after CV, and I see how much it weighs on you when you don't get a response or when another rejection comes in. Please know that you are not alone in this. Unemployment is quite high right now and so many people are walking the same road, even though it doesn't always feel that way.

What I want you to do is stay the course. Keep applying, keep showing up, keep believing. You will make it eventually and when you do, all of this struggle will make sense.

Sincerely,
Your partner

9367ec4e459365a7.text: My dearest love. I am so delighted to be standing here with you on this beautiful day as we begin our forever together. I cannot believe this day is finally here, the day we have been speaking about for so long, the day I have been counting down to in my heart. As we are gathered here in front of our family and friends, I hereby give you my whole heart and my whole life. You are so handsome, my love, and I cannot believe I get to call you mine for the rest of my days. I will look at you everyday and still feel the same way I feel right now. Even though I do not deserve a love as pure and as faithful as yours, I give all of my life to you, all of my tomorrows, all of my joys and even all of my sorrows. May we age together with grace and continue to capture beautiful memories along the way.

501bb12caabde1c0.text: I am sitting down to write this letter because words spoken are sometimes lost, but words written stay forever. You have been my best friend for years and years now, through every season of my life, but I do not think I have ever properly thanked you for the way you carried me when my mother was sick in hospital. That was one of the hardest seasons of my life, and you did not leave my side. You ran around for me, you did the errands I could not do, you handled the small things that felt so big to me at that moment, and you made everything so much easier than it had any right to be. You did all of this without complaint, without asking for anything in return; you just showed up. I really appreciate you, friend, more than my words can show. Thank you for being a true sister to me. I love you.

d0f7347ad85ae674.text:
My dear husband,today I promise to love you,cherish you and stand by your side through all life's joys and challenges. You have been the best thing that have ever happened to me, and i don't see my future without you my love. I vow to support your dreams as if they were my own, to listen to your heart even when no words are spoken, and to be your rock in times of need.

I promise to laugh with you when joy fills our home, to cry with you in those moments where life feels heavy, and to build a life together brick by brick. Only God knows what the future hold but i will continue to pray for the best over and over again.

I cherish every big moment we share and even the small ones that nobody else sees. I love you so so much my dear husband and i can't wait to spend the rest of my life with you.

53b9ce1defc850b9.text: Hey Friend. I hope your doing well! I have been meaning to write this letter for the longest time, but words have been failing me-between trying to find the right ones and trying not to cry while writing them, the days kept slipping by. 8f18498f26042e94.text:
Dear friend,

I apologise to you from the bottom of my heart for what I did, knowing fully well that no apology of mine will ever be enough to undo the hurt that I caused. I know that I betrayed your trust in a way that simply cannot be justified, and I am not even going to try to dress it up in soft words or excuses. You deserved better from me, and I failed you in a way that I will carry with me for the rest of my days. You were a loyal friend to me, the kind of friend who shows up no matter the time or the distance, and I repaid that loyalty with carelessness.

I understand how important trust is to a friendship, and so I understand the depth of what I have broken. I hope that one day you can find it within yourself to forgive me, even if our friendship cannot be what it was before.

34dea5f8423f0399.text:
Hi everyone

It has been a long time coming and I am so happy I finally get to stand up here today and say a few words about my dear cousin, the birthday girl. My name is Lakyn, and I am so excited for this new chapter in her life. 

I have been keeping so busy with life lately but I would not have missed this evening for anything in the world. I recently visited the old neighbourhood and I had so many flashbacks about us as little girls, especially that one time in primary school when we got into so much trouble for swapping our school uniforms during break time. We laughed so hard the teacher could not even stay angry. Her passion for life still amazes me. 

She is kind, she is sharp, she is hilarious. I would love for you all to raise your glasses to my cousin tonight. 

Warm regards
Lakyn

fc0b9157800b01f4.text:
Dear bride and groom,

Words cannot express how much joy it brings me to stand here today as we celebrate this beautiful milestone of marriage. Looking at the bride, my heart goes back to our preschool days, those long afternoons of crayons and lunchboxes, never imagining that all these years later we would be standing here, with her in her wedding dress and me by her side. 

From those humble beginnings, of borrowed bicycles and big dreams whispered over school fences, we have walked together into this season of fruitful rewards, of which today is one of the most beautiful. I sometimes question myself about who I would have become had it not been for the friendship and discipline she instilled in me along the way, and I will always cherish that. 

May you both carry that same discipline, that same patience, and that same love into this new milestone of marriage. Wishing you a prosperous and blessed life together.

Thanks a million, and more!

38aba0d915c28e17.text:
Hello everyone! My name is the deceased's old university friend, and I had the great honor of knowing Mike for many beautiful years. We met in our first year of university, both of us a little lost on campus and trying to figure out where our lecture halls were. From that day onwards, a connection was formed and never left since.
A few years later, in the strangest twist of fate, we bumped into each other while we were on holidays in Spain. I cannot tell you the joy of that random afternoon, two old friends standing in the middle of a foreign country, laughing in disbelief! We decided to stay there for some months and take a tour of the country together, and those months remain some of the best months of my entire life.
Mike was a beautiful soul, and I am very proud to have called him my friend. Now let us all raise our glasses and celebrate the life he lived.

90335a2de5a3adff.text:
Dear old friend, 
It has been such a long time since we last properly spoke, and I just want you to know how happy I am to finally sit down and write to you. Life has carried us in different directions, but you have never been far from my thoughts. How have you been? I really hope you are well, and that life has been gentle with you these past months. 
I have got some little news of my own, I recently started a new job, and although it has been a big adjustment, I am so grateful for the opportunity. Each new day teaches me something fresh. 
I have also been thinking back to last summer at the beach, the long walks, the salty air, the way we laughed about nothing for hours. Those moments truly carry me on the heavy days. 
Thank you for being such a beautiful part of my story. Let us not let so much time pass again, please.
With all my love,
Your old friend

dear old friend,

so much has happened on my side. i started a new job recently and it has been challenging but in a good way, i feel like i am finally growing into the person i always hoped to be. i think you would be proud of me. work has been busy, family is well, and i have been making time for the things i love again, the small things that bring me joy.

me.

eb06587997b85389.text:
Hey friend!
I'm so sorry I forgot your birthday- I really cannot believe I let it pass without even sending a message, after I had promised you we would celebrate it together this year.
I've been completely overwhelmed with work lately- the new project has been eating up all my time and my brain has felt like mush most days. But I know that's not an excuse, because no matter how busy life gets, I should have remembered the one day that matters most for you.
I know you must be very hurt, and honestly, I would be too- it might take a long time for you to forgive me, and I understand that completely.
Maybe, if you're open to it, we can still celebrate your birthday now! I want to take you out to a really fancy restaurant- the one with the rooftop view we always talk about.
Let me make this up to you, please.
Take care,
Me.

73e92b0252dcd9ce.text:

Just a quick letter to remind you of how much you mean to me and how proud I am of you, even on the days that you struggle to be proud of yourself. Today you turn 18 and you have officially achieved adulthood. You know how important this milestone is in your life. Reaching this age is not just about a number, it is about stepping into a new world full of responsibilities and possibilities. The world is waiting to see what you have to offer, and I have no doubt that you have a lot to give.

My husband recently injured his back and we have been quietly dreading the first snowfall, knowing that it would be one more thing he could not do, and frankly one more thing piling on top of me. Please let me know if there is ever anything we can do for you in return, whether it is a meal one evening or a hand with something around your house. We really do appreciate it more than I can say.

Do not let this world look down on you or its ways change you. Stay the kind soul that you are, that is your power. Love yourself first my baby, love yourself loud, and know that aunty loves you always, no matter how old you grow or how far you travel.

90ef4d2c5b534731.text:
Hey friend, it has been weighing on me since the day we last spoke and I just couldn't sit with it any longer. My dear friend, I am deeply sorry for what I did. It wasn't intentional and I am sorry how it made you feel. I have replayed the whole thing in my head over and over, and each time I just wish I could go back and do it differently.

I truly apologize of how I reacted that day, I shouldn't have left my feelings get in the way of how I responded to you. You did not deserve any of that. You have been such a good friend to me through so many seasons, and the last thing I would ever want is to bring pain into your life.

I miss you so much, and I cannot wait for us to sit face to face and talk it through over a cup of coffee. Please find it in your heart to forgive me, and let us go back to being us.

Your friend
Tracey

0bec09b5b6293e85.text:
Good day everyone and thank you for joining us here today on this beautiful day to celebrate an amazing sweetheart. 1ef878a1509d6a19.text:
Hallo my dear friend, I hope this letter finds you well and that you are coping as best as you can during this difficult time. I have been thinking about you alot since we last spoke and I just wanted to write and let you know that I am here for you, no matter what time of day or night.

Please do not hesitate to reach out whenever you need a listening ear or a helping hand. I will always make myself available to you. I hope you do not mind, but I have been popping by the house and helping out where I can without making a big deal of it. I have picked up a few groceries for you and dropped them at the door, and i have been keeping an eye on the post too. It is the least I can do for someone who has done so much for me and my family in the past.

Please call me anytime you need anything at all, and let me know when it would be alright for me to come and visit you in person. Sending you all my love and strength.

4e7559c09e9cc21c.text:
Dear friend,

Just a quick note to let you know that I have been thinking about you and wondering how on earth you are getting on.  It really has been far too long since we last saw each other and that is not okay - we used to be so good at keeping in touch and somehow life has got in the way of all that.

A lot has happened on my end since the last time we sat down together - I will save the full story for when we catch up properly but the headline news is that I have finally got engaged after all those years of insisting I never would.  I cannot quite believe it myself.  It has been a wonderful and slightly terrifying few months, and you came to mind so often during it all.

Please give me a call when you have a moment so we can arrange to meet up properly.  My number has not changed - call any time, day or evening.

Wishing you lots of love.

Your Friend x

1b76a287748faf23.text: dear friends and family today i am standing here to celebrate my best friend who i have known since we were small kids in primary school. i remember the first day i met her, i was new at the school and standing at the gate alone when she came up to me at break and offered to share her sandwich with me, from that day on we have been inseparable. growing up we did everything together, we used to walk to school together hand in hand and we used to sit at the back of the class passing little notes to each other when the teacher was not looking. she loves chocolate cake more than anything in this world but she absolutely hates onions, she would pick them out of every meal her mother made and put them on the side of the plate in a neat little pile. one of my favourite memories with her is the time we tried to bake a cake for her mothers birthday and we ended up burning half the kitchen and laughing for hours after. i have known her now for almost twenty years and i would not trade her for anything in this world.

aef63524f3a03184.text:
My friend, I have been carrying this letter in my head for weeks now and I finally decided to sit down and put it on paper because you deserve to hear it properly. I am very grateful for your kindness, more than you will ever know.

Thank you for being there when it mattered the most, when I had nowhere else to turn and no real way of even asking for help, you just showed up. You did not wait for me to break down and beg, you stepped in quietly the way only a true friend does. We are so lucky to have you in my life.

So consider this a little thank you for a big act of kindness. I know it cannot match what you did for us, but please accept it from a sincere heart. 7ed8727d26d5d2ac.text:
Dear friend,

The kindness, generosity and thoughtfulness you've shown me are gifts I will never take lightly. Your encouragement and support during the toughest stretches of my life lifted me when I had nothing left in me to lift myself. 23c7c36ae0b094fe.text:
My love, 

Three years ago I met you and I had no idea you would become my whole world. We have grown through challenges, through patience, through laughter and through quiet moments of understanding that taught me what real love looks like

You have seen me at my worst, the days where I could not even see myself, and somehow you loved me harder than I ever asked for. Our faith journey has been a beautiful one, full of mutual respect and proof that love truly does rise above all things, even when life tries to test us.

Today I stand before you and vow to protect the life we have built, to nurture the love that holds us, to walk besides you not behind or in front, just next to you. I promise to choose you in confusion, in chaos, in joy and in stillness.

I love you deeply and I am yours, today and always.

6b0bbee116a8e440.text:
Dear love, 
im writing this letter because i can see the weight you have been carrying lately. the stress at work, the doubts about your abillities, feeling isolated and the family stuff thats been pressing on you. please know that you are not alone in this.

i see how hard you push yourself, the pressure to succeed and the difficulty balancing everything. its okay to feel a bit overwhelmed, its okay to be tired. you are human and emotional exhaustion is real. im here, not to fix everything but to walk besides you, to listen and to hold space.

i will keep showing up in the small ways, the morning texts, the warm tea, the quiet moments where i just sit beside you. our relationship struggles will pass, the doubts will quiet down, and the storm will settle.

i acknowledge what you are going through and i love you deeply
with love and warmth <yours always>

49b693654b659388.text:
Dear Matt, 

My love, my partner, my person, six years later and I finally get to blow the dust off of this letter I wrote. 

When I first met you, oh boy, I never liked you. You were the "play boy" you get in those cringy romantic movies or Wattpad books, the captin of the university soccer team with the smirk that thought it could fix everything. I rolled my eyes every single time someone said your name. 

We saw each other in school but never spoke, until that one party, you remember, the one with the bad music and the worse punch. You came over and started talking and I thought, okay, he wasn't so bad. 

Now here we are, six years deep, and the play boy turned out to be the love of my life. I vow to love you, to laugh with you, to fight fair and stay soft. 

Forever yours, 
Dani

ac0bf07538db4533.text: my daughter, my heart, my love, my baby girl this letter is to remind you of who you are when the world tries to tell you otherwise. you are beautiful, you are kind, you are special in my heart in a way no one else can ever be. i remeber when you were small and you used to follow me around the kitchen asking endless questions , you were curious and brave even then . you are my best daughter in the world . dont let anyone make you feel small , you can do whatever you need in this life and you will get it , i promise you. when you doubt yourself remember that mama believes in you, when you cry remember that mama is here, when you win remember that mama saw it coming. you are made of strenght and softness all at once. i love you my baby , forever and always , no man no job no struggle can take that away from you . your mother

My dear friend

Words cannot describe how deeply saddened I am to hear about the passing of your loved one. My heart is heavy with you today, and I want you to know that you are not walking through this alone.
I can clearly remember the warm afternoons we all spent together, the laughter, the stories, and the way they had of making everyone feel seen and welcomed. I will hold those memories close to my heart, and I hope in time you will too.
Now, in this difficult chapter, please know that I am here. Whatever you need; a phone call at 2am, a meal dropped at the door, a quiet seat beside you, I am here. Truly. 

May you find comfort in the love that surrounded them, and strength in the love that surrounds you now. Please accept my deepest condolences, my friend. I am with you, today and always.

Looking back, there were seasons of loneliness, where I felt like no one understood what I was going through and the days felt heavy and quiet. But God was there with me, even when I could not feel Him. There were times when I was sick, when my body was weak and my spirit was tired, but He healed me and lifted me up. 0c962beb313d41e4.text:
Hello my dear friend. I hope this letter finds you well and in good health. It has been quite a while since we had a meaning full chat and I have been missing our conversations dearly. The transition has not been easy, leaving behind the familiar streets of our youth, but I am settling in slowly and embracing the new chapter as best I can. 

The pace here is much faster than what we are used to, and the people are different too, but there is also a kind of beauty in starting fresh. I have learnt many new lessons already, lessons that no school could have taught me. 

When are you free for a chat, preferably in the coming weeks? I would truly love to hear your voice and catch up properly. I belive we have plenty to share my friend.

b0f0026911bf5249.text:
Hello my dear friend, I'm writing this letter today because I know you have been struggling lately with your sense of direction in life. Please know that purpose comes with clarity, but clarity comes only when we keep moving. There is no light bulb moment for most of us, it's a gradual unfolding.
The sacrifices you are making today are not wasted, they're paving way for an easy future, trust me on this. I'm SUPER PROUD OF YOU for even thinking deeply about your path. Many people just drift, but not you.
Research and development are continous tasks, even when we die our works lives on. So whatever it is you're building right now, keep building. It will outlast you.
Dear friend, here's the truth, whether you do it now or not, you will be older than you're today in coming years. So why not start now? Why wait? The future is coming regardless, lets meet it ready.
Cheers to your journey

Megan!

I'm so sorry to hear about Rover - I just got the news. What a special boy he was, and what a long, happy life you gave him. Old age is a kind way to go, but it doesn't make it any easier when it's your buddy.

I'll never forget the day you brought him into the office. The chaos! He found that printer cable in about 30 seconds flat, and the puddle by reception... legendary. Everyone still talks about it. Sandra hasn't forgotten, that's for sure! It was honestly one of the best days we've had in that building - that dog had personality.

If you need anything at all - a coffee, a cry, someone to come over and just sit on the couch with you - just shout. First round is on me when you're up for it. Take all the time you need; the team has got you covered.

Rover was a top dog. Annie sends her love.

Love you, mate.

Hey.

Its been way too long, and I have been meaning to write to you for ages now. Life just has a way of getting busy, doesn't it? I figured a letter would be better than a quick text because you deserve more than that, and I have so much to fill you in on. 

I now have two boys, can you believe it? They are wild, loud and absolutely amazing. I actually coach both of their sports teams now. We finally bought a house, nothing fancy, but its not far from where we grew up which feels kind of full circle if you really think about it.

My parents are doing alright, getting older, slower, but still themselves. 

I miss you. Don't be a stranger, ok? Love you.

Dear Zoe,
I miss you so much it actually hurts sometimes. I keep meaning to write and then life gets in the way, but today I sat down and just made myself do it. I have so much to tell you.
I just started a new job at this cozy little bookstore on Main Street. It's the kind of place that smells like old paper and coffee, with creaky floors and a cat that sleeps in the front window. You would absolutely love it. I think you'd want to live there.
The other day a girl walked in and dropped a whole stack of hardcovers right by the front desk. They went everywhere. And I swear to god, all I could think about was the great library cart disaster of senior year. Remember how we ran? I almost burst out laughing in front of her.
I've been trying to learn guitar again. I keep humming those goofy little tunes we made up, the one about the lunch lady especially.
Write back soon, please. I miss you.
Love,
Me

My love.

From the moment I met you, I knew you were someone special. There was just something about you that I cannot even put into words, but my heart knew, and my heart was right.

You loved me from who I was, not who I was trying to be, and that alone changed me forever. You showered me with lot of love, with patience, with kindness and you made everything seen possible, even on the days I doubted myself the most. I love you (kiss).

As we stand here today, in front of God, our family and our friends, I promise to love you unconditionally, no matter what life throws at us. I vow to support your dreams and stand besides you as you chase them. I vow to laugh with you, to cry with you and to build a life together, a life that is filled with love, joy and adventure.

You are my person, my love, my forever. I love you Brother... I mean Husband, warmly.

8fd060167ebbf2d5.text:
Dear my friend,

I'm really sorry that things have felt so heavy lately. I know you're carrying a lot right now - the career change, the questions about your marriage, and the uncertainty about what your future will look like. It is a lot for one person to hold at the same time, and I just want you to know that I see you.

It's normal to feel lost when life is shifting in many directions at once. You don't have to have all the answers today, and you don't have to walk through this alone. I'll be here - whether you want to talk, cry, sit in silence, or take a long walk like we used to. I'm not going anywhere.

Please be gentle with yourself. You don't need to figure it all out at once. One step at a time, one breath at a time. I belive in you, and I'm so proud of you.

With warmth and love,
Me

Hi Fred,
I would just like to take a moment to say how truly sorry I am to hear about the passing of your mum. My heart is heavy for you, and I have been thinking about you and the family non-stop since I heard the news. 

Your mum was such an incredible woman- supportive, encouraging, and so very loving. I will never forget how warmly she welcomed me into your home, every time, without fail. She had this gift of making everyone feel like they belonged. I remember the Sunday lunches, her endless cups of tea, and the way she would gently encourage you in everything you did- even the silly things. She was a true light.

If there is anything at all I can do- a meal, a phone call, a quiet visit- please just reach out. 
With love and prayers,

I love you so much, brother, and I want you to know that I can't trade you for any friend in this world, not even in the next life, I'll still want you to be my best friend.

The decorations, the food, the people you brought, all of it touched me deeply.

My dear friend, l am kindly writing this letter to you to express how sorry l am about the passing of your loved one. My heart is heavy for you and l have been thinking about you a lot lately.

Losing someone is not easy, and l can only imagine the pain you are feeling at the moment. l wish to feel better with time, and l know that healing does not happen overnight. l am praying for you and your family during this difficult time.

Yours

633a8f7b05c35e35.text:
My friend,

I honestly do not know how to start this letter. I found out about your loss last Tuesday from your sister and my heart sank. She told me everything, how it happened, and I just sat on my bed and cried. I am so sorry. 
I keep thinking about last Christmas when we were all together. Do you remember how we stayed up until 2am wrapping the last of the gifts and laughing until our stomachs hurt? Those memories are now even more precious to me.

Death is so cruel. It does not warn you, it does not ask, it just takes. It leaves us with words we never said and hugs we never gave. It is the most unfair thing.

Please take your time to grieve, my friend. Healing is not a straight line. Cry when you need to, rest when you can, and lean on the people who love you. I am one of those people.

I love you so much.

When I think of you, I think of someone curated and fortified by time, like good meat and wine. The years have only sharpened what was already remarkable in you. You are ever young and bright, increasingly wise, and somehow you have managed to keep that boyish spark in your eye while quietly accumulating the kind of depth that takes most of us a lifetime to even glimpse.

I have seen your worst, the bad days, the lost months, the seasons where nothing went right. But knowing your worst has only enhanced my appreciation of your best. It is the contrast that does it. The shadow makes the light brighter.

May you forever be this happy and this full of life. May the years continue to be kind to you and you to them. And, with whatever grace your wisdom now permits, may you forget all my trespasses with age.

Happy birthday, my friend.

My dear Anna

It has been far too long since I last wrote to you, and yet you have been on my mind constantly these past few weeks. You have been my closest friend since we were teenagers, and even though life has pulled us in different directions, the thread between us has never broken.

I find myself thinking about our school days often, the long bus rides home, the silly notes we used to pass in class, the afternoons we spent at your kitchen table eating biscuits and dreaming about the future. Those memories are some of the warmest I carry.

Your kindness, your patience and your honest heart have shaped me in ways you may not even realise. I find myself trying to be more like you with every passing year; calmer when life is loud, gentler when life is hard. As I step into this next chapter of mine, I will carry those lessons with me.

With all my love,

Dear Mia,
I don't even know where to start, but thank you. I keep replaying that camping trip in my head, when my little brother got food poisoning and I was completely losing it, and you just showed up. No questions, no fuss, just there. That is who you are.
You packed the most thoughtful little care kit, the ginger ale, the saltines, his favorite fuzzy blanket, the one with the dinosaurs. He clutched that blanket like it was the only thing keeping him on Earth, and honestly, it might have been. 
"Roots need room to dream," my grandma used to say, and I think that's what you do for the people you love, you give them room to land softly when everything is falling apart. 
And then you cleaned up the tent. Without complaining once. It was gross, Mia, truly gross, and you just rolled up your sleeves like it was nothing.
I am so lucky to have you. Always.
Love,
Me

Dear old friend,

It's been far too long since we last spoke and I have been meaning to write to you for weeks now. I'm sorry I let so much time pass without checking in. I hope this letter finds you well, with a smile on your face and good people around you.

I recently started a new job, and on my first day - of all things! - I walked into the office and the smell of the coffee in the corridor reminded me so much of our morning catch-ups at that little place near campus. It hit me how much I miss our talks. The long ones, the silly ones, the ones where we put the world to rights over a too-strong latte.

I think about our old times often. The road trips, the late nights, the inside jokes I still don't share with anyone else. I'd love to hear how you've been - really been.

Hi Mark,

A lot has happened on this side. I am, of course, married now - I know, I know - and we have two children! Whom would have thought that? Some days I still don't believe it myself. They are wonderful, mate, really.
